notes: MULTI-SITE — de-bake the hardcoded AUS-01 identity (Level 2, ship A of 3). STACKS ON v1.6.79 (Resolve): deploy v1.6.79 first, then this; this zip's dct-ios.html contains both. (3) Header chrome (boot eyebrow, app-loc, shift-report sub-header) reads the profile facility instead of hardcoded 'CoreWeave · AUS-01', neutral when unconfigured.
